markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Define the technical strategy for building the Smith.ai Knowledge Hub.](https://fathom.video/share/n6s77PqFHZFmDxBpK1kuaFJzoUvo44jh?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Decision:** Build the Knowledge Hub as a new, separate Webflow collection, abandoning the original plan to use the existing blog collection.](https://fathom.video/share/n6s77PqFHZFmDxBpK1kuaFJzoUvo44jh?tab=summary&timestamp=757.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This is the only viable path to support the hub's distinct pillar/cluster page designs and URL structure, which the rigid blog collection template cannot accommodate.](https://fathom.video/share/n6s77PqFHZFmDxBpK1kuaFJzoUvo44jh?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
  - [**Migration Plan:** Move existing hub-related content (e.g., "AI Calling System") to the new collection, then implement 301 redirects from the old blog URLs to preserve SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/n6s77PqFHZFmDxBpK1kuaFJzoUvo44jh?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
  - [**Hybrid Discovery:** Keep old articles in the blog collection (but redirected) so they remain discoverable via the main blog's category filters, creating a seamless user experience.](https://fathom.video/share/n6s77PqFHZFmDxBpK1kuaFJzoUvo44jh?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)

## Topics

### The Problem: Webflow Constraints

  - [The original plan to build the Knowledge Hub within the existing `blog` collection was blocked by Webflow's technical limitations:](https://fathom.video/share/n6s77PqFHZFmDxBpK1kuaFJzoUvo44jh?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
      - [**Single Template:** A CMS collection can only use one template for all its pages.](https://fathom.video/share/n6s77PqFHZFmDxBpK1kuaFJzoUvo44jh?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
      - [**Reserved URL Path:** The `/blog/` folder is reserved for the blog collection, preventing custom subfolders like `/blog/knowledge-hub/`.](https://fathom.video/share/n6s77PqFHZFmDxBpK1kuaFJzoUvo44jh?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

### The Solution: A New CMS Collection

  - [The team agreed to build the hub as a new, separate Webflow collection.](https://fathom.video/share/n6s77PqFHZFmDxBpK1kuaFJzoUvo44jh?tab=summary&timestamp=757.0)
  - [**Why it works:**](https://fathom.video/share/n6s77PqFHZFmDxBpK1kuaFJzoUvo44jh?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
      - [**Design Flexibility:** Enables the hub's unique pillar (black hero) and cluster (gray hero) page designs.](https://fathom.video/share/n6s77PqFHZFmDxBpK1kuaFJzoUvo44jh?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
      - [**Scalability:** Supports the planned growth from 6 to \~15 pillar pages and 20+ cluster pages per pillar.](https://fathom.video/share/n6s77PqFHZFmDxBpK1kuaFJzoUvo44jh?tab=summary&timestamp=598.0)
      - [**Clean CMS:** Keeps the content organized and manageable.](https://fathom.video/share/n6s77PqFHZFmDxBpK1kuaFJzoUvo44jh?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)

### Implementation Plan

  - [**URL Structure:** Jo will define a new, SEO-friendly URL structure for the hub (e.g., `/knowledge-hub/pillar-name/article-name/`).](https://fathom.video/share/n6s77PqFHZFmDxBpK1kuaFJzoUvo44jh?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)
  - [**Content Migration:**](https://fathom.video/share/n6s77PqFHZFmDxBpK1kuaFJzoUvo44jh?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
      - [Move content from existing hub-related blog articles to the new collection.](https://fathom.video/share/n6s77PqFHZFmDxBpK1kuaFJzoUvo44jh?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
      - [Implement 301 permanent redirects from the old blog URLs to the new hub URLs.](https://fathom.video/share/n6s77PqFHZFmDxBpK1kuaFJzoUvo44jh?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
  - [**SEO & User Experience:**](https://fathom.video/share/n6s77PqFHZFmDxBpK1kuaFJzoUvo44jh?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)
      - [Keep the old articles in the blog collection (though redirected) so they still appear in the main blog's category filters.](https://fathom.video/share/n6s77PqFHZFmDxBpK1kuaFJzoUvo44jh?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)
      - [This creates a seamless discovery path for users browsing the main blog.](https://fathom.video/share/n6s77PqFHZFmDxBpK1kuaFJzoUvo44jh?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jo:**](https://fathom.video/share/n6s77PqFHZFmDxBpK1kuaFJzoUvo44jh?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)
      - [Define the new URL structure and share it with Volodymyr.](https://fathom.video/share/n6s77PqFHZFmDxBpK1kuaFJzoUvo44jh?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)
      - [Explain the technical rationale to Maddy.](https://fathom.video/share/n6s77PqFHZFmDxBpK1kuaFJzoUvo44jh?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)
  - [**Volodymyr:**](https://fathom.video/share/n6s77PqFHZFmDxBpK1kuaFJzoUvo44jh?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)
      - [Build the new Webflow collection and page templates based on the Figma designs.](https://fathom.video/share/n6s77PqFHZFmDxBpK1kuaFJzoUvo44jh?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)
      - [Share progress via Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/n6s77PqFHZFmDxBpK1kuaFJzoUvo44jh?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)
  - [**Jo & Volodymyr:**](https://fathom.video/share/n6s77PqFHZFmDxBpK1kuaFJzoUvo44jh?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
      - [Schedule a follow-up for late Dec/early Jan to coordinate the 301 redirect implementation.](https://fathom.video/share/n6s77PqFHZFmDxBpK1kuaFJzoUvo44jh?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
